Control Description: Ensure all data resides within South African borders

Require background checks for personnel accessing government data
Implement incident response within sovereign boundaries

Use technology solutions that support sovereign operations

Segment networks for different government classification levels

Use private endpoints for all government PaaS services

Adopt government-mandated compliance frameworks
